# logs --since dumps every run in the window with a header; --lines
# tail-trims each emitted run.

exec eon add --cron '@every 1s' --name ticker -- echo "line 1\nline 2\nline 3"

exec eon daemon &daemon&
exec sleep 3.5

# At least 2 runs should have landed in this window.
exec eon logs ticker --since 10s
stdout '==> run #1'
stdout '==> run #2'

# --lines 1 per run, so each emitted block keeps only the last line.
exec eon logs ticker --since 10s --lines 1
stdout '==> run'
# Headers still present; the per-run body was trimmed.

# Plain (no flags) gets just the most recent run, no header.
exec eon logs ticker
! stdout '==> run'

exec eon stop
wait daemon
